summary: Phase 7 testing complete. SSP endpoints with unique URL-based identification working. Fixed Campaign Comparison API to accept JSON body. All 14 backend tests pass. All 4 frontend pages working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SSP name matching uses regex with space conversion from URL hyphens/underscores - works correctly but requires SSP names with spaces in database to be URL-accessible via hyphenated URLs
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added CampaignCompareRequest Pydantic model for POST /api/campaigns/compare to accept JSON body
/app/frontend/src/lib/api.js - Updated compareCampaigns to send { campaign_ids: [...] } JSON body
seed_data_creation: Test SSP endpoints with prefix TEST_PHASE7_ were created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSP identification now via unique endpoint URLs /api/bid/{ssp_name}. Generic endpoint /api/bid still works. Invalid SSP names return 404, inactive SSPs return 403. Campaign Comparison, Bid Stream, and A/B Testing pages all functional.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: FastAPI endpoint expected campaign_ids as query parameter List[str], but frontend sent JSON body
bugs_fixed.fix: Created CampaignCompareRequest Pydantic model and updated endpoint to accept request body. Updated frontend to send proper JSON body with campaign_ids key

ssp_endpoints_page.page_loads: PASS - SSP Endpoints page loads with data-testid
ssp_endpoints_page.unique_urls_displayed: PASS - Each SSP shows unique endpoint URL like /api/bid/demo-ssp
ssp_endpoints_page.stats_displayed: PASS - Requests, Bids, Wins, Spend stats shown for each SSP

ssp_specific_bid_endpoint.POST /api/bid/{ssp_name}: PASS - Returns 200/204 for valid active SSP
ssp_specific_bid_endpoint.inactive_ssp: PASS - Returns 403 for inactive SSP endpoint

generic_bid_endpoint.video_bid_request: PASS - Video bid requests handled correctly

bid_stream.GET /api/bid-stream: PASS - Returns recent bids from memory
bid_stream.live_updates: PASS - Status shows 'Live', Pause/Refresh buttons work

ab_testing.page_loads: PASS - /ab-testing shows test list and stats
ab_testing.GET /api/ab-tests: PASS - Returns list of A/B tests
ab_testing.test_controls: PASS - Pause/Complete buttons shown for each test

frontend_pages_tested: /ssp-endpoints - SSP Endpoints management with unique URLs
